items.title: Broken object level authorization (BOLA/IDOR)
items.description: Swap object IDs across users and roles; test horizontal and vertical access.
items.how_to_find: Map API surface from OpenAPI/Swagger, mobile traffic, or JS bundles. Swap object IDs across users and roles; test horizontal and vertical access. Test "Broken object level authorization (BOLA/IDOR)" by swapping object IDs, tokens, and HTTP methods in Burp Repeater. Fuzz JSON fields and GraphQL queries for mass assignment and depth abuse.
items.how_to_fix: Enforce OAuth2/OIDC correctly, validate JWT claims, object-level authorization on every endpoint, rate limits per IP/key/user, schema validation, API gateway WAF, and deprecate weak API versions.
